sections.description: A self-hosted conversational site search for WordPress. No external APIs, no monthly fees, no data leaves your server. Field-weighted BM25 ranking with intent matching, synonym expansion, and optional PDF indexing.
sections.changelog:
0.7.0

  • Added: Optional PDF indexing. Extract and index the text layer of Media Library PDFs so their contents are searchable alongside posts and pages.
  • Added: Pure-PHP PDF text extractor (FlateDecode, ASCII85, ASCIIHex). Encrypted PDFs skipped; scanned/image-only PDFs fall back to Media Library metadata.
  • Added: "Maximum PDF size" setting (default 20 MB) to protect memory on shared hosting.
  • Note: PDF search results link directly to the file.

0.6.2

  • Changed: Consolidated the four Tools menu entries into a single top-level "MBR Site Assistant" admin menu with native submenus.
